---
name: Bug report
about: Report an issue with the TenantScale documentation
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the issue**
A clear and concise description of what's wrong with the documentation.

**Page**
Link to the specific page: https://docs.tenantscale.com/...

**What's incorrect or missing?**
A clear description of the inaccuracy or what needs to be added.

**Suggested fix**
If you have a suggestion for how to fix it, describe it here.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the documentation issue here.
